# CWE-798: Use of Hard-coded Credentials
lang: go
file: CWE-798-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

// Vulnerable: database credentials are embedded directly in source code.
func ConnectReporting(c *gin.Context) {
	dsn := "postgres://reporting:Tr4ck3rP@ss@db.internal:5432/reports?sslmode=disable"
	db, err := sqlx.Connect("postgres", dsn)
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, err.Error())
		return
	}
	defer db.Close()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"connected": true})
}
